revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building

| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo|ar|سوسانو|azb|سوسانو|bcl|Susanoo|be|Сусанаа|bg|Сусаноо|ca|Susanoo|cs|Susanoo|da|Susa-no-o|de|Susanoo|el|Σουσάνoο|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|eo|Susanoo|es|Susanoo|eu|Susanoo|fa|سوسانو (خدا)|fi|Susanoo|fr|Susanoo|hr|Susano|hu|Szuszanoo|hy|Սուսանո|id|Susanoo|it|Susanoo|ja|スサノオ|ka|სუსანოო-ნო-მიკოტო|ko|스사노오|la|Susano'o|lb|Susanoo|mni|ꯁꯨꯁꯅꯨ-ꯅꯣ-ꯃꯤꯀꯣꯇꯣ|nl|Susanoo|pl|Susanoo|pt|Susanoo|ro|Susanoo|ru|Сусаноо|simple|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|sl|Susanovo|sr|Сусаноо|su|Susanoo|sv|Susanoo|ta|சுசானவோ|th|ซูซาโนโอะ|tr|Susanoo|uk|Сусаноо|vi|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|zh_min_nan|Susanoo|zh|素戔嗚尊|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hikawa Shrine'''|氷川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q125314171|ltq=Q125314171|qid=Q125314171|1=Hikawa shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11636413|ltq=Q11636413|qid=Q11636413|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echizen Province}}
** Series ordinal: 96
** P155: {{ill|Ohomisono Shrine|lt=Ohomisono Shrine|qid=Q135040236|1=Ohomisono Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040239|ltq=Q135040239|qid=Q135040239|1=Heitano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Echizen Province|lt=Echizen Province|ceb|Echizen|cs|Provincie Ečizen|de|Provinz Echizen|en|Echizen Province|es|Provincia de Echizen|fa|ولایت اچیزن|fr|Province d'Echizen|gl|Provincia de Echizen|id|Provinsi Echizen|it|Echizen (provincia)|ja|越前国|ko|에치젠국|lt|Ečidzeno žemė|nl|Echizen (provincie)|pt|Província de Echizen|ru|Этидзэн (провинция)|simple|Echizen Province|sk|Ečizen (provincia)|sr|Провинција Ечизен|tr|Echizen (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Етідзен|zh_min_nan|Etizen-kok|zh_yue|越前國|zh|越前國|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}}
* {{ill|Q7402764|ltq=Q7402764|qid=Q7402764|1=Sakai District, Fukui}}
